buildCommand: curl -sSL https://github.com/rust-lang/mdBook/releases/download/v0.4.40/mdbook-v0.4.40-x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu.tar.gz | tar -xz && curl -sSL https://github.com/badboy/mdbook-mermaid/releases/download/v0.17.0/mdbook-mermaid-v0.17.0-x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu.tar.gz | tar -xz && export PATH=$PATH:$PWD && ./mdbook build
